title: pilosella cymosa var. praealta
intro: Pilosella cymosa var. praealta, also known as Prickly Saxifrage, is a flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Pilosella cymosa var. praealta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
